title: Chainsaw Man Paintings
description: Adds new Minecraft paintings featuring characters and scenes from Chainsaw Man.
body:
This mod adds a collection of new Minecraft paintings featuring characters and scenes from Chainsaw Man.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb74c0c3740c61b09ba97ca49907e56854beedd.jpeg)

- You can place the paintings in the same way as vanilla paintings.
- This mod does not replace any existing paintings and is compatible with other painting mods.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!

_fan creation: not officially associated with the original creators_
